en_title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Achievements All Available Offline, At Any Difficulty Setting
cn_title: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》全成就离线可解锁

results.en_title: Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced Achievements All Available Offline, At Any Difficulty Setting
results.cn_title: 《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》全成就离线可解锁，不限难度
results.subtitle: 再也不用担心错过
results.opus_summary: 育碧公布《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》完整成就列表，所有成就均可离线解锁且不限难度。本作为纯单人体验，原版多人模式未保留。成就设计鼓励探索与趣味互动，例如打破50个盆栽或与七种友善动物互动。游戏将于7月9日发售。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft has detailed the full list of achievements available in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced , and stated that all will be available offline after the game's installation is complete.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧公布了《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》的完整成就列表，并表示所有成就均可在游戏安装完成后离线获取。

paragraphs.en: This is perhaps not too surprising as Black Flag Resynced will be an entirely single-player experience (the original game's multiplayer offering has not made the leap to this remake), but notable perhaps due to Ubisoft's previous form of sunsetting games like The Crew.
paragraphs.cn: 这或许并不太令人意外，因为《黑旗 记忆重置》将是一款纯单人体验（原版的多人模式并未被带到这次重制中），但考虑到育碧此前曾关停《飙酷车神》等游戏，这一声明可能仍值得注意。

paragraphs.en: The same lengthy list of in-game awards will be available to unlock across platforms, so will be offered as Steam achievements, Xbox achievements and PlayStation trophies, Ubisoft said in a blog post via Steam .
paragraphs.cn: 育碧在Steam上的一篇博文中表示，这份同样冗长的游戏内奖励列表将可在各平台解锁，因此会以Steam成就、Xbox成就和PlayStation奖杯的形式提供。

paragraphs.en: No achievement can be missed during your explorations of the Caribbean, Ubisoft has said, with awards instead geared towards marking fun or unique activities in the open world. All achievements are also available at any in-game difficulty setting.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧称，在探索加勒比海的过程中不会错过任何成就，这些奖励旨在标记开放世界中有趣或独特的活动。所有成就也可在任何游戏难度设置下获取。

paragraphs.en: Personal favorites on the list here include "Edward Catway," which seems to reward feline lack of care for property by breaking 50 potted plants, and "Friend to All," which will pop when you interact with all seven types of friendly animal. (Yes, you can pet the cow.)
paragraphs.cn: 列表中我个人最喜欢的包括「爱德华·猫道」，这个成就似乎是通过打破50个盆栽来奖励那种猫式的不爱护财产行为；还有「万物之友」，当你与全部七种友善动物互动后就会弹出。（没错，你可以抚摸奶牛。）

paragraphs.en: Here's the full list of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced achievements for you to begin hunting down when the game arrives on July 9:
paragraphs.cn: 以下是《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》的完整成就列表，你可以在游戏于7月9日发售时开始逐一解锁：

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips是IGN的新闻编辑。你可以通过tom_phillips@ign.com联系他，或在Bluesky上找到他。

results.opus_summary: 育碧公布了《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》的完整成就列表，确认所有成就均可离线获取，且不限游戏难度。本作为纯单人体验，原版多人模式未保留。成就设计旨在鼓励探索与趣味玩法，无需担心错过。游戏将于7月9日发售。

paragraphs.en: Ubisoft has detailed the full list of achievements available in Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced , and stated that all will be available offline after the game's installation is complete.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧公布了《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》的完整成就列表，并确认游戏安装完成后，所有成就均可离线获取。

paragraphs.en: This is perhaps not too surprising as Black Flag Resynced will be an entirely single-player experience (the original game's multiplayer offering has not made the leap to this remake), but notable perhaps due to Ubisoft's previous form of sunsetting games like The Crew.
paragraphs.cn: 这或许并不太令人意外，因为《黑旗 记忆重置》将是一款纯单人游戏（原版的多人模式并未移植到这部重制版中），但考虑到育碧此前曾停服《飙酷车神》等游戏，这一举措或许仍值得注意。

paragraphs.en: The same lengthy list of in-game awards will be available to unlock across platforms, so will be offered as Steam achievements, Xbox achievements and PlayStation trophies, Ubisoft said in a blog post via Steam .
paragraphs.cn: 育碧在 Steam 上发布的一篇博客中表示，这份长长的游戏内奖励列表将在各平台同步推出，因此会以 Steam 成就、Xbox 成就和 PlayStation 奖杯的形式呈现。

paragraphs.en: No achievement can be missed during your explorations of the Caribbean, Ubisoft has said, with awards instead geared towards marking fun or unique activities in the open world. All achievements are also available at any in-game difficulty setting.
paragraphs.cn: 育碧表示，在加勒比海的探索过程中，没有任何成就会错过，这些奖励旨在标记开放世界中的有趣或独特活动。所有成就也均可在任意游戏难度下解锁。

paragraphs.en: Personal favorites on the list here include "Edward Catway," which seems to reward feline lack of care for property by breaking 50 potted plants, and "Friend to All," which will pop when you interact with all seven types of friendly animal. (Yes, you can pet the cow.)
paragraphs.cn: 我个人比较喜欢的成就包括「爱德华·猫特威」，似乎是奖励你打碎 50 个花盆，展现猫咪对财物的漠不关心；以及「众生之友」，与全部七种友好动物互动即可解锁。（没错，你可以摸牛。）

paragraphs.en: Here's the full list of Assassin's Creed Black Flag Resynced achievements for you to begin hunting down when the game arrives on July 9:
paragraphs.cn: 以下是《刺客信条：黑旗 记忆重置》的完整成就列表，供你在游戏于 7 月 9 日发售后开始收集：

paragraphs.en: Tom Phillips is IGN's News Editor. You can reach Tom at tom_phillips@ign.com or find him on Bluesky
paragraphs.cn: Tom Phillips 是 IGN 的新闻编辑。你可以通过 tom_phillips@ign.com 联系他，或在 Bluesky 上找到他。
